metadata.reference: K. M. McPeak, S. V. Jayanti, S. J. P. Kress, S. Meyer, S. Iotti, A. Rossinelli, D. J. Norris. Plasmonic films can easily be better: Rules and recipes. ACS Photonics 2, 326-333 (2015)
metadata.comments: Thermally evaporated Cu at 35 Å/s with base pressure of 3e-8 Torr, template stripped from Si wafer
